ocr_findings.description: ROI formula rendered as LaTeX block '$$ROI = \frac{利益}{投資額}$$' rather than the visual fraction shown in image. Content is fully preserved; rendering differs.

reviewer_notes: Page covers ROIとは definition and formula, '試験にはコレが出る！' summary box with 5 bullet points, and 要件定義プロセス section (image shows page number 204). All key content including the five exam-tip bullet points and the ユーザーのニーズ distinction paragraph are faithfully reproduced. LaTeX rendering of the formula is an acceptable OCR convention.
